title: Build Lachesis cycle 1 as a zero-dep metrics engine over the committed Clotho weave snapshot
decision: Implement Lachesis's four measurements + fail-closed ingestion of the REAL weave snapshot format, correcting the authorized plan's input schema against ground truth (per The Eye 'code it and watch the next round'). Metric semantics + identity scope were RULED by the GPT seat (delegated by The Eye): relevance = 3:2:1 salience with corrected orientation (depends-on->to, verified-by/introduced-by->from), reported not risk-feeding; identity = intra-snapshot bijection (Ruling A) with explicit NON-CLAIMs.
verified: 100 assertions pass over the real 4001-edge snapshot (docs/runs/lachesis-argo-1 review rounds 1-5). Cycle-1 declared complete by The Eye 2026-07-18 with residuals recorded as NON-CLAIMs.
held_for_the_eye: the enrollment-flip (move out of registered-unimplemented + verify-contracts expectation) and durable trust-root anchoring in CURRENT-AUTHORITY.
